titleStmt.title: SII 36.101: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 101. (A.R. No. 101 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Magāḷēśvara temple, and at the end of the above record.

summary.p: The inscription records a tax free grant of land measuring about 2(3/4) (vēlis) to the various temple servants like, dēvaraḍiyar and her 12 assistants. singers, and image bearers and also for the supply of sacred food offerings in the temple by Udaiyamārthāṇda Mūvēndavēḷān. At the end of the inscription is a verse in veṇbā meter recording his endowment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī rājetrecoḻadevaṟku patinañcāmāṇṭu Uyyak koṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu k kāṇi Uṭaiya Amparuṭaiyen tirukāmakoṭṭamuṭaiyār tribhuvana śaṇṭecuvara tevakanmikaḷ pakkal nān koṇṭa pon Eḻu kaḻañcu Ippon Eḻu kaḻañcuṅ koṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu tevatāna māṅkuṭi Ellaikku vaṭakkum melppāṟkellai meṟ m nilattukku teṟku
m kīḻpāṟkellai koṭṭurellaikku meṟkum Innānkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam māvum tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiyār kanmikaḷukku pon koṇṭu caytu ṭaiya nen Ālaivūril mūnṟināl nilam Iraṇṭemukkāle Arai mā tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiyāḷ koyilil cevikkum tevaraṭiyāḷ Eṭuttāru nilam Araikkālāka Ivar panniruvar peṇṭukaḷukku viṭṭa nilam Onṟaraiyum Ivarkaḷuṭaṉ pāṭuvāṟku viṭṭa nilam kālum paḷḷiyaraikku Eḻuntaruḷuvikkavu mīṇṭum tirukkāma koṭṭattukku Eḻuntaruḷuvikka śrī
pātam tāṅkuvārkaḷukku viṭṭa nilam mūnṟu mākkāṇiyum Amutupaṭikku viṭṭa nilam mukkāle Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum Āka nilam Iraṇṭe mukkāle Arai māvum Iṟaiyili ceyvittu Itu tenciṟuveḷūruṭaiyān piraman Amutanāna Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventaveḷānen § Ampar mākāḷarkaṇi koṭukākum koḷukayum cempoṉeḻupatināl certtinān kompanayāy vāḷār paṭai Utaiyamāttāṇṭa mūventaveḷān ciṟuveḷūr veṉ
Digital edition of SII 36.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
